mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items (item_name, price1, price2, price3) VALUES (#{itemName},#{price1},#{price2},#{price3})
INSERT INTO item_stock (item_id, item_name, current_cnt, last_updated) VALUES(#{id}, #{itemName}, 0, now())
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.item_name, i.current_cnt, i.price1, i.price2, i.created_at FROM items i WHERE i.item_name like CONCAT('%',#{itemName},'%') AND i.use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT customer FROM item_history WHERE customer like CONCAT('%',#{customer},'%') GROUP BY customer
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO item_history ( customer, customer_tel,date , item_idx, item_name, cnt, type, created_at, cust_num, address, price) VALUES
( #{customer}, #{customerTel}, #{date}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.cnt}, #{type}, now(), #{custNum}, #{address}, #{item.price} )
mapper.select:
SELECT i.id, i.item_name, i.current_cnt, i.price1, i.price2, i.created_at FROM items i WHERE 1=1
AND i.created_at between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
AND i.item_name like CONCAT('%',#{itemName},'%')
AND i.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY i.item_name
SELECT id, item_id, price1, price2, price3, create_at FROM item_price WHERE item_id = #{id} ORDER BY create_at desc
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET price1 = #{price1}, price2 = #{price2} WHERE id = #{id}
